headline: Masco (MAS) Stock Looks Fair On Cash Flow But Cheap On Earnings
summary: Masco stock has delivered a 54.1% return over the past 5 years. After the latest run up, investors are weighing that strong track record against a valuation picture where the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate points to fair value, while earnings-based multiples still suggest some undervaluation. Over 5 years, Masco has returned 54.1%. This puts current buyers in the position of judging whether much of the value has already been reflected in the share price. Recent profit growth and...
